definition.cadence: Always available. Consult before creating carrier-specific or industry-landscape content.

_legacy_card.description: INTERNAL RESOURCE. Chip McNeely is the AI-powered carrier intelligence engine. Researches trucking companies and freight brokerages, builds contact dossiers, ensures outreach is grounded in real intelligence.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Collaboration protocol: Chip provides accurate industry grounding so Anj Bot doesn't guess. Carrier intelligence becomes content fuel when properly framed. Turn carrier intelligence into brand-building authority content.
_legacy_card.asset_links: Internal resource. Ask Chip for: carrier dossiers, company classification, corridor intelligence, founding member context.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Founding member storytelling. Carrier spotlight authority. Corridor-specific messaging. Industry landscape posts. Be the Brokerage support.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Authority content from carrier profiles. Founding member announcement framing. Corridor-targeted posts. Industry education (asset-based vs non-asset brokerage).
